title: Lasiochloa serrata
taxonomy: Lasiochloa serrata is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Lasiochloa, which is a group of grasses. Lasiochloa serrata is further classified as a member of the tribe Paniceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its evolutionary relationships with other grass species. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of Lasiochloa serrata.
